calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award And Obtain Judgment On Award
Off Calendar May-14-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Petitioner Goodman Group Holdings LLC's motion to confirm arbitration award is granted. No opposition filed. Goodman is entitled to judgment in its favor and against respondent Custom Spaces, Inc. in the amount of $13,765.99, comprised of $10,957 for the award, $521.81 in post award interest pursuant to the award, and $2,287.18 in fees for the petition. Order signed
in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600 =302/hk
